details.test: Task 1: Enroll 10–12-year-old in cheapest qualifying spring soccer program
Task 2: One-time $75 donation to Girls Basketball Scholarship Fund covering fees
Task 3: Volunteer signup for Saturday morning beginner soccer within 10 miles
Task 4: Create account, find highly-rated affordable program, save to favorites
Task 5: Register siblings together for a program with SIBLING10 promo applied
Task 6: Register family of three for earliest qualifying 5K with per-person cost < $20
Task 7: Newsletter subscription with soccer, tutoring, girls programs, Spanish, monthly
Task 8: Save newest concussion-related article to Parent Toolkit
Task 9: Retrieve head coach contact info for U12 Girls Soccer team
